description.value:
No.JS: Declares reactive state. Value is a JS object literal.

```html
<div state="{ count: 0, name: 'World' }">
```

**Companions:** `persist`, `persist-key`, `persist-fields`, `persist-schema`

No.JS: Declares a named global store.

```html
<div store="cart" value="{ items: [], total: 0 }">
```

**Companion:** `value`

No.JS: Declares a computed property.

```html
<div computed="fullName" expr="firstName + ' ' + lastName">
```

**Companion:** `expr`

No.JS: Watches an expression for changes.

```html
<div watch="count" on:change="console.log($old, $new)">
```

**Companion:** `on:change`

No.JS: HTTP GET request.

```html
<div get="/api/users" as="users" loading="spinner-tpl">
```

**Companions:** `as`, `loading`, `error`, `empty`, `success`, `then`, `redirect`, `confirm`, `refresh`, `cached`, `body`, `headers`, `var`, `into`, `retry`, `retry-delay`, `params`, `debounce`

No.JS: HTTP POST request. Same companions as `get`.

```html
<form post="/api/users" body="{ name: name }" as="result">
```
No.JS: HTTP PUT request. Same companions as `get`.
No.JS: HTTP PATCH request. Same companions as `get`.
No.JS: HTTP DELETE request. Same companions as `get`.

No.JS: Binds element text content to a JS expression.

```html
<span bind="user.name">
```

No.JS: Binds element innerHTML to a JS expression.

```html
<div bind-html="richContent">
```

No.JS: Two-way data binding for form elements (INPUT, SELECT, TEXTAREA).

```html
<input model="username">
```

No.JS: Conditionally renders element. Removes from DOM when false. ```html
Welcome!
Please log in
``` **Companions:** `then`, `else`, `animate-enter`, `animate-leave`, `transition`, `animate-duration`

No.JS: Conditional branch after `if`. ```html
Admin panel
``` **Companion:** `then`

No.JS: Fallback branch after `if` or `else-if`. No value needed. ```html
Default content
``` **Companion:** `then`

No.JS: Toggles element visibility via CSS `display`. Element stays in DOM. ```html
Visible content
``` **Companions:** `animate-enter`, `animate-leave`, `transition`, `animate-duration`

No.JS: Opposite of `show`. Hides element via CSS `display: none`. ```html
Content
``` **Companions:** `animate-enter`, `animate-leave`, `transition`, `animate-duration`

No.JS: Switch statement. Children use `case`, `default`, `then`. ```html

Admin panel

User dashboard

Guest view

```

No.JS: Loops over an iterable. Syntax: `"item in list"`.

```html
<li each="user in users" bind="user.name">
```

Loop context: `$index`, `$count`, `$first`, `$last`, `$even`, `$odd`

**Companions:** `template`, `else`, `key`, `animate-enter`, `animate-leave`, `animate-stagger`, `animate-duration`

No.JS: Alternative loop directive with more options. Supports inline templates (element's content) or external templates via `template` (optional).

**Inline template:**
```html
<li foreach="user" from="users" bind="user.name">
```

**External template:**
```html
<li foreach="item" from="products" template="item-tpl">
```

Loop context: `$index`, `$count`, `$first`, `$last`, `$even`, `$odd`

**Companions:** `from`, `index`, `else`, `filter`, `sort`, `limit`, `offset`, `template` (optional), animation attrs

No.JS: Dispatches a custom event.

```html
<button on:click="count++" trigger="countChanged" trigger-data="count">
```

**Companion:** `trigger-data`

No.JS: Declares a reference to this element, accessible via `$refs`.

```html
<input ref="emailInput">
<!-- Access via $refs.emailInput -->
```
No.JS: Inserts a `

No.JS: HTTP call triggered by user action (e.g., button click).

```html
<button call="/api/delete/1" method="delete" confirm="Are you sure?" loading="spinner-tpl">
```

**Companions:** `method`, `as`, `loading`, `into`, `success`, `error`, `then`, `redirect`, `confirm`, `body`, `headers`

No.JS: Form validation with pristine-aware errors.

```html
<form validate="" error-class="is-invalid" validate-on="input blur">
  <input name="email" validate="required|email" error-required="Email is required" />
</form>
```

Built-in validators: `required`, `email`, `url`, `min`, `max`, `custom`

**Companions:** `error`, `error-*`, `error-class`, `validate-on`, `validate-if`, `as`, `success`

No.JS: CSS class(es) applied to invalid fields after interaction.

```html
<form validate="" error-class="is-invalid">
  <input name="email" validate="required" error-class="field-error" />
</form>
```

Can be set on the form (applies to all fields) or on individual fields.

No.JS: Validation trigger events (space-separated).

```html
<form validate="" validate-on="input blur">
<input validate="required" validate-on="blur" />
```

**Values:** `input`, `blur`, `focusout`, `submit`

Defaults to `input focusout` if not specified.

No.JS: Conditional validation expression. Field is only validated when expression is truthy.

```html
<input name="company" validate="required" validate-if="isBusinessAccount" />
```

No.JS: Wraps content with error handling. Value is the fallback template ID. ```html
...
```

No.JS: i18n translation. Value is the translation key.

```html
<span t="greeting" t-name="World">
```

**Companions:** `t-*` (interpolation params), `t-html`

No.JS: Sets i18n namespace for child elements. When used without a value on `route-view`, the namespace is auto-detected from the template name. ```html
```

No.JS: Makes element draggable.

> **Plugin required:** Moved to `@erickxavier/nojs-elements`. Include via CDN (auto-installs) or ESM with `NoJS.use(NoJSElements)`.

```html
<div drag="item" drag-type="card" drag-class="dragging">
```

**Companions:** `drag-type`, `drag-effect`, `drag-handle`, `drag-image`, `drag-image-offset`, `drag-disabled`, `drag-class`, `drag-ghost-class`, `drag-group`

No.JS: Makes element a drop target.

> **Plugin required:** Moved to `@erickxavier/nojs-elements`. Include via CDN (auto-installs) or ESM with `NoJS.use(NoJSElements)`.

```html
<div drop="items.push($drag)" drop-accept="card" drop-class="over">
```

**Companions:** `drop-accept`, `drop-effect`, `drop-class`, `drop-reject-class`, `drop-disabled`, `drop-max`, `drop-sort`, `drop-placeholder`, `drop-placeholder-class`

**Handler vars:** `$drag`, `$dragType`, `$dragEffect`, `$dropIndex`, `$source`, `$target`, `$el`

No.JS: Sortable list with drag and drop.

> **Plugin required:** Moved to `@erickxavier/nojs-elements`. Include via CDN (auto-installs) or ESM with `NoJS.use(NoJSElements)`.

```html
<ul drag-list="items" template="item-tpl" drag-type="card">
```

**Companions:** `template`, `drag-list-key`, `drag-list-item`, `drop-sort`, `drag-type`, `drop-accept`, `drag-list-copy`, `drag-list-remove`, and more

No.JS: Enables multi-select drag on `drag` elements.

> **Plugin required:** Moved to `@erickxavier/nojs-elements`. Include via CDN (auto-installs) or ESM with `NoJS.use(NoJSElements)`.

```html
<div drag="item" drag-multiple drag-group="cards">
```

**Companions:** `drag-group` (required), `drag-multiple-class`

No.JS: Sets the base URL for all descendant fetch directives (`get`, `post`, `put`, `patch`, `delete`, `call`). ```html
```

No.JS: Companion for `state`. Persists state to localStorage.

```html
<div state="{ count: 0 }" persist>
```

No.JS: Companion for `state`. Custom localStorage key.

```html
<div state="{ count: 0 }" persist persist-key="myState">
```

No.JS: Companion for `computed`. The expression to evaluate.

```html
<div computed="total" expr="price * quantity">
```

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives (`get`, `post`, etc.) and `call`. Names the response data variable. Defaults to `"data"` for `call`.

```html
<div get="/api/users" as="users">
```

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Template ID to show while loading.

```html
<div get="/api/data" as="data" loading="spinner-tpl">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Template ID to show when response is empty.
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Template ID to show on success.

No.JS: Companion attribute. For HTTP directives: expression to run on success. For `if`/`else`/`else-if`: template ID to render.

```html
<div if="isAdmin" then="admin-panel">
<div get="/api" as="d" then="console.log(d)">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives, `call`, and router. Path to redirect to after success.

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Shows confirmation dialog before executing.

```html
<button call="/api/delete/1" confirm="Are you sure?">
```

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Auto-refresh interval in milliseconds.

```html
<div get="/api/notifications" as="notifs" refresh="30000">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Enables response caching.

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Request body expression.

```html
<form post="/api/users" body="{ name: name, email: email }">
```

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Custom request headers object.

```html
<div get="/api/data" headers="{ 'X-Custom': 'value' }">
<button call="/api/action" headers="{ 'Authorization': token }">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Variable name to store additional data.

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives and `call`. Store name to put response data into.

```html
<button call="/api/cart" into="cart">
```

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Number of retry attempts on failure.

```html
<div get="/api/data" retry="3" retry-delay="1000">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Delay between retries in milliseconds.

No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Query parameters object.

```html
<div get="/api/search" params="{ q: query, page: page }">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Debounce delay in milliseconds before making request.

No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Path to the list to iterate over.

```html
<li foreach="item" from="items">
```

No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Custom name for the index variable.

```html
<li foreach="item" from="items" index="i">
```
No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Filter expression for list items.
No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Property name to sort by.
No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Maximum number of items to display.
No.JS: Companion for `foreach`. Number of items to skip.

No.JS: Companion for `each`, `foreach`, `drag-list`. Template ID to use for rendering items.

```html
<ul each="item in items" template="item-tpl">
```

No.JS: Companion for `each`. Expression for unique item key to optimize DOM updates.

```html
<li each="user in users" key="user.id">
```

No.JS: Companion for `call`. HTTP method to use.

```html
<button call="/api/item/1" method="delete">
```

No.JS: Companion for `trigger`. Expression for event detail data.

```html
<button trigger="notify" trigger-data="{ message: 'Hello' }">
```

No.JS: Child attribute for `switch`. Value to match against. ```html

Active

```

No.JS: Child attribute for `switch`. Fallback when no `case` matches. ```html

Unknown status

```

No.JS: Companion for `t`. Renders the translation value as sanitized HTML (via `_sanitizeHtml()`) instead of plain text. ```html
```

No.JS: Animation name for element enter/appear.

```html
<div if="show" animate="fadeIn">
```

No.JS: Animation name for element entering (alias for `animate`).

```html
<div if="show" animate-enter="fadeIn" animate-leave="fadeOut">
```

No.JS: Animation name for element leaving.

```html
<div if="show" animate-leave="fadeOut">
```

No.JS: Animation duration in milliseconds.

```html
<div if="show" animate="fadeIn" animate-duration="500">
```

No.JS: Incremental delay between animated list items in milliseconds.

```html
<li each="item in items" animate="fadeInUp" animate-stagger="50">
```

No.JS: CSS transition name. Uses class convention: `{name}-enter`, `{name}-enter-active`, `{name}-enter-to`, `{name}-leave`, `{name}-leave-active`, `{name}-leave-to`.

```html
<div if="show" transition="fade">
```

No.JS: Router outlet container. Renders matched route templates.

```html
<div route-view src="./pages/" transition="fade">
```
No.JS: Route path declaration on `
No.JS: CSS class applied when element's route is active. ```html Home ```
No.JS: CSS class applied only on exact route match. ```html Home ```
No.JS: Index page name for `route-view`. Default: `"index"`.

No.JS: Named outlet for `<template>`. Default: `"default"`.

```html
<template route="/dashboard" outlet="sidebar">...</template>
```

No.JS: Route guard expression. Evaluated before entering route.

```html
<template route="/admin" guard="isAuthenticated">
```

No.JS: Template source URL for `route-view` or `<template>`.

```html
<div route-view src="./pages/">
<template src="./components/header.tpl">
```
No.JS: File extension for `route-view` templates. Default from config.

No.JS: Loading strategy for templates.

```html
<template src="./heavy.tpl" lazy="ondemand">
```
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Type identifier for the dragged item. Used with `drop-accept` for filtering.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Drag effect cursor indicator.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: CSS selector for the drag handle element.

```html
<div drag="item" drag-handle=".handle">
```
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: CSS selector for custom drag image element.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Offset for custom drag image as `"x,y"`.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Expression to disable dragging conditionally.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: CSS class applied to element while being dragged.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: CSS class applied to the ghost element left behind while dragging.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Group name for `drag-multiple` multi-selection.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: CSS class applied to multi-selected drag items.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Comma-separated list of accepted `drag-type` values.

```html
<div drop="handleDrop()" drop-accept="card,task">
```
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Drop effect cursor indicator.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: CSS class applied when a valid drag item is over the drop target.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: CSS class applied when an invalid drag item is over the drop target.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Expression to disable dropping conditionally.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Maximum number of items the drop target accepts.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Sort direction for drop targets. Value: `"vertical"` (default), `"horizontal"`, or `"grid"`.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: HTML string or tag name for the placeholder element shown during drag.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: CSS class for the drop placeholder element.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Unique key property for `drag-list` items.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Variable name for current item in `drag-list` template.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Copy items instead of moving when dragging from this `drag-list`.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Remove items from source list after dragging.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: CSS class applied during the settle animation after a drop in `drag-list`.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: CSS class applied to `drag-list` when it has no items.

No.JS: Companion for `store`. Initial store data as a JS object literal.

```html
<div store="cart" value="{ items: [], total: 0 }">
```
No.JS: Companion for HTTP directives. Template ID shown on error, or template ID for `call` error handling.
No.JS: Synchronously clones an inline template into the current position. Used on `

No.JS: Companion for `state` + `persist`. Comma-separated list of fields to persist selectively. Unlisted fields use their initial values on page load.

```html
<div state="{ theme: 'dark', sidebar: true, tempData: null }"
     persist="localStorage"
     persist-key="prefs"
     persist-fields="theme,sidebar">
```

No.JS: Reactively sets the document ``. Place on a `<div hidden>` element. ```html <div hidden page-title="product.name + ' | My Store'"></div> <div hidden page-title="'About Us | My Store'"></div> ``` Watches the expression and updates `<title>` whenever the reactive context changes.

No.JS: Reactively sets `` in ``. Creates the tag if it doesn't exist. ```html
``` Watches the expression and updates the meta content whenever the reactive context changes.

No.JS: Reactively sets `` in ``. Creates the tag if it doesn't exist. ```html
``` Watches the expression and updates the canonical URL whenever the reactive context changes.
No.JS: Reactively sets `

No.JS **compiler output attribute**. Maps directive names to pre-compiled function indices. Injected by the CLI compiler (`nojs build`) ŌĆö do not author manually.

```html
<!-- Generated by nojs build -->
<span bind="user.name" data-nojs-e="0,1">
```

At runtime the framework reads this map and uses the corresponding pre-compiled function from `NoJS._compiled` instead of parsing the expression.

No.JS **compiler output attribute**. Marks a `<template>` as having a pre-compiled descriptor. Injected by the CLI compiler (`nojs build`) ŌĆö do not author manually.

```html
<!-- Generated by nojs build -->
<template id="user-card" data-nojs-desc="user-card">
```

At runtime the framework reads the descriptor from the injected `__nojs_descriptors` JSON script block to skip re-parsing template directives on instantiation.

No.JS **SSG hydration marker**. Indicates this element was pre-rendered at build time. Injected by the CLI compiler (`nojs build`) ŌĆö do not author manually. ```html John ``` Values: `bind`, `class`, `style`, `show`, `loop`, `if`. The NoJS runtime skips initial render for these elements and removes the attribute after hydrating reactivity.

No.JS **internal compiler element reference**. Maps elements to JS variables (`_e0`, `_e1`, etc.) in the compiled script block. Injected by the CLI compiler (`nojs build`) ŌĆö do not author manually. ```html John ``` Automatically removed after hydration.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Declares a modal dialog with focus trapping, stacking z-index, and ARIA attributes. ```html

Are you sure?

``` **Companions:** `modal-class`, `modal-escape`, `modal-backdrop`

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Opens a modal by ID on click. Without value, finds nearest modal.

```html
<button modal-open="my-dialog">Open</button>
```

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Closes a modal. Without value, closes closest ancestor modal. With value, closes by ID.

```html
<button modal-close>Cancel</button>
```
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Additional CSS class(es) applied while the modal is open.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Set to `"false"` to disable closing with Escape key and backdrop click.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Set to `"false"` to remove the dark backdrop overlay.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Wraps a toggle, menu, and items into a dropdown unit. ```html
  • Edit
``` **Companions:** `dropdown-position`, `dropdown-align`
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Opens/closes the dropdown menu on click. Must be inside a `[dropdown]` container.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Menu panel using `popover="auto"` for light-dismiss. Receives `role="menu"`.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Actionable menu item with keyboard navigation. Receives `role="menuitem"`.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Primary axis for dropdown menu placement.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Cross-axis alignment of the dropdown menu relative to the toggle.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Shows a tooltip on hover/focus.

```html
<button tooltip="Save your changes">Save</button>
<button tooltip="Options" tooltip-position="bottom">Menu</button>
```

**Companions:** `tooltip-position`, `tooltip-delay`, `tooltip-disabled`
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Tooltip placement relative to the trigger element.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Delay in milliseconds before the tooltip appears (default: 300).
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Reactive boolean expression. When truthy, prevents tooltip from showing.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Declares popover content linked to a trigger. ```html
Profile
``` **Companion:** `popover-position`

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Opens the linked popover on click.

```html
<button popover-trigger="help-tip">?</button>
```

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Closes the closest ancestor popover on click.

```html
<button popover-dismiss>Got it</button>
```
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Popover placement relative to the trigger element.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Defines where toast notifications appear on screen. ```html
```

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Watches an expression and shows a toast when truthy.

```html
<button toast="message" toast-type="success" toast-duration="5000">
  Save
</button>
```

**Companions:** `toast-type`, `toast-duration`, `toast-dismiss`
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Visual type of the toast notification.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Auto-dismiss delay in milliseconds (default: 3000). Use `0` for permanent toasts.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Whether to show a dismiss button (default: `"true"`).

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Tab container coordinating `tab` and `panel` elements. ```html
Panel 1
Panel 2
``` **Companion:** `tab-position`
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Tab trigger inside a `[tabs]` container. Receives `role="tab"`.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Tab panel inside a `[tabs]` container. Receives `role="tabpanel"`.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Placement of the tab list relative to panels.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Reactive expression. When truthy, the tab cannot be activated.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Tree root with keyboard navigation and ARIA tree roles. ```html
  • Projects
    • NoJS
``` **Companion:** `tree-icon`

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Expandable tree item. Use `branch="expanded"` to start open. ```html
  • Collapsed
  • Open by default
    • ```
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Collapsible subtree group inside a `[branch]`. Receives `role="group"`.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Set to `"false"` to hide expand/collapse triangle icons.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Multi-step container with progress indicator and validation. ```html
...
...
``` **Context:** `$stepper.current`, `$stepper.total`, `$stepper.isFirst`, `$stepper.isLast`, `$stepper.next()`, `$stepper.prev()` **Companions:** `stepper-mode`, `stepper-indicator`, `stepper-nav`

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Step panel inside a `[stepper]` container. ```html
...
``` **Companions:** `step-label`, `step-validate`
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Navigation mode. Linear validates before advancing; free allows clicking any step.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Show/hide the progress indicator (default: `"true"`).
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Show/hide Previous/Next buttons (default: `"true"`).
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Custom label shown in the stepper progress indicator (default: `"Step N"`).
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Expression that must be truthy for the step to pass validation in linear mode.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Shimmer placeholder while a reactive expression is truthy. ```html

Title

``` **Companions:** `skeleton-type`, `skeleton-lines`, `skeleton-size`
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Shape of the skeleton placeholder.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Number of simulated text lines. Last line is 60% width for a natural look.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Explicit dimension (width/height) for `circle` or `rect` types. Appends `px` if value is a bare number.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Resizable split container with draggable gutters. ```html
Sidebar
Main
``` **Companions:** `split-gutter`, `split-persist`

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Defines a pane inside a `[split]` container. Omit value for flexible fill. ```html
Sidebar
Main content
``` **Companions:** `pane-min`, `pane-max`, `pane-collapsible`
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Minimum pane size in pixels (default: 0).
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Maximum pane size in pixels (default: Infinity).
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Enables collapse/expand via double-click on the adjacent gutter.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Gutter width (horizontal) or height (vertical) in pixels (default: 6).
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: localStorage key for saving/restoring pane sizes. Stored under `nojs-split:<key>`.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Enables sort coordination on a ``. ```html
Name
```

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Marks a `<th>` as a sortable column. Click cycles asc/desc/unsorted.

```html
<th sort="name">Name</th>
<th sort="age" sort-type="number" sort-default="desc">Age</th>
```

**Companions:** `sort-type`, `sort-default`
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Comparator type for sorting.
No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Initial sort direction applied on page load.

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Makes `<thead>` sticky at the top of its scroll container (`position: sticky; top: 0`).

```html
<thead fixed-header>
  <tr><th sort="name">Name</th></tr>
</thead>
```

No.JS _(nojs-elements plugin)_: Pins a `<th>` or `<td>` to the left edge during horizontal scrolling (`position: sticky; left: 0`).

```html
<th sort="name" fixed-col>Name</th>
```
